access_token.description: SurveyMonkey OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: SurveyMonkey API base URL override for tests or proxies.

survey_id.description: SurveyMonkey survey ID; required for the collectors and survey_responses streams, which are scoped to a single survey.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
